    1. apply(ProcessSystem, double)

Interface MonteCarloSimulator.ParameterApplier

All Superinterfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
MonteCarloSimulator
public static interface MonteCarloSimulator.ParameterApplier extends Serializable
Functional interface for applying a parameter value to a process system.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    apply(ProcessSystem process, double value)
    Applies a parameter value to a process system.

  • Method Details

    • apply

      void apply(ProcessSystem process, double value)
      Applies a parameter value to a process system.
      Parameters:
      process - the process system to modify
      value - the parameter value to apply
